name: X760 + H-Flow + S30

payloads.name: S30
payloads.purpose: mission payload affecting mass and center of gravity

tuning_goal: stable payload flight with conservative response and clear center-of-gravity checks
notes: Treat steady hover bias as possible S30 payload center-of-gravity offset before trim changes.
Check payload mounting stiffness if low-frequency sway appears.
Use smaller PID steps than the base aircraft because payload inertia is higher.
